title: Non-metallic phosphorus antiwear additives
abstract: The present disclosure relates generally a lubricating composition, for example, of an engine. The present disclosure relates more particularly to a lubricating composition including one or more non-metallic phosphorus antiwear additives.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A lubricating composition comprising: a base oil present in a total amount of at least 70 wt%; and one or more antiwear compounds present in a total amount in the range of 0.01 wt% to 5 wt%, having the formula: wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from phenyl substituted with one, two or three substituents each selected from C1-C3 alkoxy and NO2. 2. The lubricating composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricating composition is substantially free of tris(2-methylphenyl) phosphate. 3. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from phenyl substituted with one, two or three substituents each selected from C1-C2 alkoxy and NO2. 4. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from phenyl substituted with one, two or three NO2. 5. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from nitrophenyl. 6. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from phenyl substituted with one, two or three substituents each selected from C1-C3 alkoxy. 7. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from methoxyphenyl. 8. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from 2-methoxyphenyl, 3-methoxyphenyl, 4-methoxyphenyl, 2- ethoxyphenyl, 3-ethoxyphenyl, 4-ethoxyphenyl, 2-nitrophenyl, 3-nitrophenyl, and 4- nitrophenyl. 9. The lubricating composition of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 is independently selected from 2-methoxyphenyl, 3-methoxyphenyl, 4-methoxyphenyl, 2- nitrophenyl, 3-nitrophenyl, and 4-nitrophenyl. 10. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-14, wherein each of Ri, R2, and R3 are the same moiety. 11. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-10, wherein the one or more antiwear compounds of formula (I) includes at least 50 wt% of tris(4-methoxyphenyl) phosphate. 12. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-10, wherein the one or more antiwear compounds of formula (I) includes at least 50 wt% of tris(4-nitrophenyl) phosphate. 13. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-12, wherein the one or more antiwear compounds are present in a total amount in the range of 0.01 to 4 wt%. 14. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-12, wherein the one or more antiwear compounds of formula (I) are present in the lubricating composition at a concentration of 200 to 1000 ppm by weight of phosphorus. 15. The lubricating composition according to any of claims 1-14, wherein substantially no (i) metal-containing antiwear additive and/or (ii) antiwear additive other than the antiwear additives of formula (I) is present in the lubricating composition. 16. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-15, wherein the base oil comprises one or more base stocks selected from Group I, Group II, Group III, Group IV and Group V base stocks, and mixtures thereof. 17. The lubricating composition of any of claims 1-16, wherein the base oil is present in an amount in the range of 70 to 99 wt%. 18. A method of lubricating a surface, the method comprising contacting the surface with a lubricating composition of any of claims 1-17. 19. A method of reducing wear on a surface, the method including lubricating an interface between the surface and a contacting surface with a lubricating composition of any of claims 1-17. 20. Use of a lubricating composition of any of claims 1-17 for lubricating a surface or for reducing wear on a surface.
